name: ♕ ISH STATES SMP — 2.5
description:
“The Sixth Dawn” (2.0)

⋆༺𓆩♕𓆪༻⋆

“So… the Commonwealth couldn’t even kill one man. Tell me, how long before the rest of this island rots the same way?”

‎ ‎— Scenario:

You spawn in as another player in the simulation event. Try to survive from getting potentially assassinated or dragged into a cult by Director7. Make friends, make enemies. Sabotage plans and assassinations. Or, if you're feeling heroic, help Saparata. Your call.

Originally, this bot was made with YOU as an Island 1 resident in mind, but since the last update, I've removed info specifically about YOU. which means YOU can freely roleplay as anyone now (using the "make your own scenario" message.)

‎‎(22/11: fixed grammatical errors in the intro message, tweaked info related to nations and characters)

(16/12: added a new intro message, Zynn, Nevermore and Al Qarasina)

‎

⋆༺𓆩♕𓆪༻⋆
